headline: Public Transport Still Fragmented Across 5 Operators
context: Despite APAD creation KL public transport remains split across 5 operators with incompatible ticketing systems.

cards.big: KL public transport split across 5 operators with incompatible ticketing
cards.sub: Commuters face 3 separate fare calculations crossing operator boundaries

cards.big: Only 22% of KL commuters use public transport versus 65% in Singapore
cards.sub: Transfer penalties averaging RM2.50 per change discourage multi-modal journeys

cards.big: Touch n Go covers only Prasarana and KTM but not feeder buses
cards.sub: Stage Bus operators in Selangor still use separate cash-only or proprietary cards

cards.big: APAD common ticketing platform promised in 2022 remains in pilot in 2026
cards.sub: Technical disputes between operators over revenue sharing stalled implementation

cards.big: Fragmented ticketing tests whether institutional coordination serves commuters or operators
Five operators, zero integration. Public transport fragmentation is a governance failure, not a technical one.
